# Sumo Auto Parts

> Auckland's specialist in genuine Japanese and European car parts. Importing direct from Japan and sourcing quality used European parts in New Zealand. Based at 133 Pilkington Road, Panmure, Auckland 1072. Phone 0800 321-777.

Sumo Auto Parts specialises in importing small used genuine parts from Japan including headlights, taillights, bumper lamps, window switches, interior sun visors, door handles and door mirrors. We also stock a large range of European new aftermarket parts and quality used parts removed from European cars in New Zealand.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sumoautoparts.co.nz/index.html): Main page covering Japanese parts speciality, featured dismantled vehicles (Nissan Elgrand E52, Nissan Serena C26, Nissan Fuga Y51), door handles range, and parts enquiry form.
- [Japanese Used Parts](https://sumoautoparts.co.nz/japanese.html): Searchable and filterable database of 1,245+ genuine Japanese used parts in stock. Covers Nissan, Toyota, Honda, Mazda, Subaru, Mitsubishi, Suzuki. Filter by make, model and part type.
- [European Parts](https://sumoautoparts.co.nz/european.html): Quality used parts from European vehicles dismantled in New Zealand (VW Golf Mk5/Mk6, Audi A3, Range Rover Freelander 2, Jaguar XJ X351, Mini Cooper). Plus new aftermarket parts including door mirror glass, window switches, third brake lights, door handle trim, BMW and Mercedes parts, Land Rover Evoque panels, and badges and emblems.

## Key Products

- Rear side outer door handles: Nissan Serena C25, Nissan Serena C26, Toyota Alphard, Toyota Voxy, Toyota Noah
- Nissan Elgrand E52: All four doors, tailgates, front bumpers, headlights, taillights, power steering pumps, nose cut
- Nissan Serena C26: All four doors, tailgates, front bumpers, headlights, taillights, non-hybrid engine, transmission, hybrid engine, nose cut
- Range Rover Evoque: Full range of new aftermarket front and rear panels, bumpers, grilles, lights, mirrors, brackets
- VW Golf GTI: New aftermarket front bumper sets MK5, MK6, MK7 including R Line models
- Door mirror glass: VW Golf MK5/6/7, VW Polo, VW Passat B6/B7, Audi A3/A4/A5/A6 — heated convex, left and right
- Window switches: Land Rover, VW, Audi, Mercedes, BMW — wide range of models

## Contact

- Address: 133 Pilkington Road, Panmure, Auckland 1072, New Zealand
- Phone: 0800 321-777
- Email: info@sumoautoparts.co.nz
- Trading hours: Monday–Friday 8:00am–5:00pm, Saturday 9:00am–2:00pm
- TradeMe store: https://www.trademe.co.nz/a/search?member_listing=8599100
